scripts.dev: npm run build -w @cove/contracts && npm run build -w @cove/ui && concurrently -n core,web -c magenta,cyan "npm run dev -w @cove/core" "npm run dev -w @cove/web"
scripts.build: npm run build -w @cove/contracts && npm run build -w @cove/ui && npm run build -w @cove/core && npm run build -w @cove/web
